docket_entries.description: ORDER VACATING DISMISSAL AND RESET FOR HEARING HEARING SET FOR FEB 5, 2026 AT 1:30 PM (SEE IMAGED ORDER).

SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
